feed.title: jessicakirson
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from jessicakirson

entry.title: The Never Ending Tour has a lot of dates on sale! I can’t wait to see you all on the road. Tickets are available on my site xoxo

entry.title: Las Vegas! I will be at @House of Blues Las Vegas the day after Thanksgiving! Tickets are available on my site for November 29th. See you all there xo

entry.title: HIII!! I have amazing news that I’m so excited to announce. My show at the Beacon Theatre on Friday, April 25th will go on presale this Wednesday at 10AM with the code SILLY. This will be the largest venue I’ve ever done in NYC so I need your help by liki
entry.content: HIII!! I have amazing news that I’m so excited to announce. My show at the Beacon Theatre on Friday, April 25th will go on presale this Wednesday at 10AM with the code SILLY. This will be the largest venue I’ve ever done in NYC so I need your help by liki

entry.title: Hiii I have added new cities to The Never Ending Tour! Presale starts tomorrow with code SILLY. Tix are on my site xoxo. #sanfrancisco #montclairnj #losangeles #sandiego #portland
entry.content: Hiii I have added new cities to The Never Ending Tour! Presale starts tomorrow with code SILLY. Tix are on my site xoxo. #sanfrancisco #montclairnj #losangeles #sandiego #portland
